tables.name: tblbookings
tables.description: Main bookings table - stores all booking/order details including customer, venue, dates, and financial information

tables.name: vwProdsComponents
tables.description: View showing product components - displays what items/components make up package products

tables.name: tblitemtran
tables.description: Equipment transactions table - tracks all equipment items in bookings including quantities, rates, and dates

tables.name: tblcrew
tables.description: Labour/crew table - stores labour assignments for bookings with tasks, hours, and rates

tables.name: tblContact
tables.description: Contact persons table - stores contact information for individuals

tables.name: tblcust
tables.description: Customer/organization table - stores customer companies and organizations

tables.name: tblLinkCustContact
tables.description: Customer-contact link table - links contacts to customer organizations (many-to-many)

tables.name: tblSalesper
tables.description: Salespersons table - stores sales representative information

tables.name: tblinvmas
tables.description: Products/inventory master table - master list of all products, packages, and equipment

tables.name: tbltask
tables.description: Labour tasks table - defines labour task types (setup, pack down, operate, etc.)

tables.name: tblInvmas_Labour_Rates
tables.description: Labour rates table - stores labour rates for products by location
